tools.name: pot_generate
tools.description: Generate a Proof of Time for a transaction. Returns cryptographically signed timestamp from NIST, Google, and Cloudflare time sources. potHash is anchored on-chain to Base Sepolia TTT ERC-1155.

chainId.description: Chain ID (e.g. 8453 for Base, 84532 for Base Sepolia)

tools.name: pot_verify
tools.description: Verify a Proof of Time using its hash and GRG shards. Returns validity, AdaptiveSwitch mode (turbo/full), and timestamp. turbo = ordering preserved, full = tamper detected.

potHash.description: PoT hash to verify (hex with 0x prefix)

grgShards.description: Array of hex-encoded GRG integrity shards

chainId.description: EVM chain ID (e.g. 84532 for Base Sepolia)

tools.name: pot_query
tools.description: Query historical Proof of Time records from Base Sepolia subgraph by pool address or time range. Returns on-chain audit trail.

poolAddress.description: DEX pool address to filter by (optional)

tools.name: pot_stats
tools.description: Get Proof of Time statistics: call volume, MEV deterrence rate, AdaptiveSwitch mode distribution, average confidence score.

tools.name: pot_health
tools.description: Check PoT system health: time source status (NIST/Google/Cloudflare), subgraph sync, server uptime, current AdaptiveSwitch mode.
